title: Advertising Investigations: September 2025
body: "Contact advertising@mhra.gov.uk if you have concerns with the advertising of medicines or write to:  Advertising Standards Unit, 10 South Colonnade, Canary Wharf, London E14 4PU  Alternatively, contact the pharmaceutical self-regulatory bodies, the Proprietary Association of Great Britain (PAGB) for advertising for over the counter medicines, or the Prescription Medicines Code of Practice Authority (PMCPA) for advertisements to health professionals for prescription medicines.  See the Blue Guide for guidance on how medicines should be promoted or advertised in the UK. "
